seed_instruction: Plan a budget-friendly weekend trip to Paris. Highlight key attractions, dining options, and public transportation routes.
org_constraint: The response must contain exactly 150 words, with each sentence containing at least 10 words.
new_constraint: The response must contain at least 16 sentences.
instruction: Plan a budget-friendly weekend trip to Paris. Highlight key attractions, dining options, and public transportation routes. The response must contain exactly 150 words, with each sentence containing at least 10 words. The response must contain at least 16 sentences.
response:
Start your Paris adventure by booking cheap trains from nearby cities early.
Visit the free Eiffel Tower at sunset for stunning views over the city.
Walk along the Seine River to see beautiful bridges without spending any money.
Explore the Louvre Museum on your first day if you have free entry tickets.
Enjoy delicious croissants at local bakeries for a very affordable breakfast meal.
Take the Metro Line 1 to reach major attractions quickly and easily today.
Find free walking tours that guide you through historic neighborhoods with friends.
Visit the beautiful Notre Dame Cathedral from the outside since it is closed.
Grab a simple baguette and cheese for lunch at a small cafe.
Ride the free hop-on hop-off bus to see many landmarks from above.
Discover hidden gems in the Latin Quarter with its lively student atmosphere.
Enjoy a picnic in the Tuileries Garden with your own packed lunch.
Use the Navigo Easy card to save money on all your subway rides.
Watch street performers in the Place de la Bastille for free entertainment.
End your trip with a cheap ice cream near the charming Montmartre hill.
